title: staging_relatedness_v0 — loose capture of one relatedness TSV
description: Staging payload for ngsRelate / ngsPedigree / mendelian / NAToRA / evalAdmix TSVs. Captures columns + rows verbatim; promote to per-analysis normalized schemas (ngsrelate_pairs_v1, mendelian_results_v1, …) once the per-page renderers stabilise on their column set.
